title: Nicola Spring Coir Door Mat - 60 x 40cm - Pinstripe - Pack of 1 - Decorative Indoor Front Door Floor Mat Entry Dirt Trapper Rug Outdoor Boot Scraper Non Slip Backing Doormat
features: Crafted from Coir Coconut Fibres - Natural strength and durability, with stiff bristles to quickly and efficiently clear your soles of dust and dirt
Non-Slip Black PVC Backing - Traps water, protecting interior carpets
Easy to Clean - Beat away dirt and mud, then brush through with water; lie flat to dry
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: Product description The range of Natural Coir Non-Slip Door Mats from Nicola Spring offers a quick and easy way to show off your personality, and create an inviting home environment for your guests right from their very first step inside. Crafted from natural coir coconut fibres, these welcome mats provide an innate strength and durability that is perfectly suited to brushing dirt, dust, mud and muck from the soles of your shoes. A non-slip PVC backing traps moisture and water, while keeping your interior carpets protected. Coming in two sizes - 40 x 60cm and 60 x 90cm - this doormat comes adorned with a Colourful Radiant Rainbow, that is sure to feel at home in a wide variety of decor styles. These doormats are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, and easy to clean - simply beat while hanging outside with a sturdy broom handle, then brush through with a small amount of water before laying flat to dry. With the Nicola Spring collection of Natural Coir Non-Slip Welcome Mats, your door is always open. Shop the range today. Safety Warning Keep mat dry to prevent slipping. Avoid harsh cleaning methods. Be cautious when walking on wet mat.
